title: guzmania lingulata
intro: Guzmania lingulata, also known as the Lion's Tail or Lion's Tongue, is a type of epiphytic flowering plant native to the tropical rainforests of Central and South America. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Guzmania lingulata include its ability to reduce fever and alleviate respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma, due to its expectorant properties. Herbal preparations of Guzmania lingulata can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, and are often used to support immune function and promote overall well-being.
